transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：

decision.archive_summary: The conversation moved from general testing claims into a concrete UX requirement: the user needs direct, continuously updating visibility into context size from the VS Code UI without manual commands or refreshes. A later concern clarified an architectural boundary: this must be done as a standalone solution and must not modify or depend on Project Assistant. The assistant then stated that a separate VS Code extension was created and the earlier Project Assistant coupling was reverted, so the implementation thread is largely resolved. Preserve the requirement and boundary as compact semantic pins; older status updates and solved implementation chatter can leave the next-turn prompt.
decision.reasoning_summary: This looks resolved rather than an active branch. The important durable content is not the step-by-step implementation history but the user’s requirements: visible context size, live updating/automatic display, and strict separation from Project Assistant. Earlier testing/status turns are solved and off the critical path. Keeping the latest user turn raw plus pins for the requirement turns is sufficient for the next turn.
